title: DAG-ML Training Replay — ReplayRequest v1
description: Public ReplayRequest for the training-owned forward-replay contract, bound to one completed TrainingOutcome. V1 deliberately exposes only PREDICT and EXPLAIN; REFIT remains a separate low-level ReplayPhaseRequest operation until the public retraining contract is frozen.

source_outcome_fingerprint.description: Exact TrainingOutcome.outcome_fingerprint authorized as replay source.

data_envelope_keys.description: Strictly sorted exact node_id.input_name keys for the externally supplied coordinator data-envelope map.

output_binding_ids.description: Strictly sorted explicit subset of source TrainingOutcome output binding ids requested from replay.

request_fingerprint.description: DAG-ML TCV1 SHA-256 of this complete request with only request_fingerprint omitted.
